on_entry: /execute if score timer minutes matches 25 if score timer seconds matches 0 run gamerule dodaylightcycle false
/execute if score timer minutes matches 20 if score timer seconds matches 0 run gamerule dodaylightcycle true
/execute if score timer minutes matches 10 if score timer seconds matches 0 run gamerule dodaylightcycle false
/execute if score timer minutes matches 5 if score timer seconds matches 0 run gamerule dodaylightcycle true
/execute if score timer minutes matches 0 if score timer seconds matches 1 run title @a reset
/execute as @a at @s if block ~ ~-3 ~ ochre_froglight run tag @s add NoClear
/execute as @a[tag=NoClear] at @s if block ~ ~-3 ~ pearlescent_froglight run tp @s ~ ~ ~-2
/execute as @a[tag=NoClear] at @s unless block ~ ~-3 ~ ochre_froglight unless block ~ ~-3 ~ pearlescent_froglight run tag @s remove NoClear
/tellraw @a[tag=dne] {"rawtext":[{"text":"§cこのエリアに入れるのはオーナーのみです"}]}
